final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing marketing poster for UGREEN NAS (绿联私有云) brand 618 anniversary celebration e-commerce announcement.

Style/medium: clean modern e-commerce poster design, flat vector with subtle depth, tech-forward retail aesthetic
Composition: centered product hero with announcement text hierarchy, balanced layout for mobile and desktop display
Subject: UGREEN NAS device (绿联私有云) as hero product, sleek white/minimal hardware design, celebrating 618 anniversary milestone
Scene/backdrop: clean gradient or abstract tech-inspired background, optional subtle confetti or celebration elements
Lighting/mood: bright even studio lighting, optimistic and promotional mood
Color palette: UGREEN brand green as primary anchor, white and light gray as base, orange or gold accent for 618 celebration highlight
Text (verbatim): "绿联私有云品牌618周年庆活动电商宣布海报"
Constraints: must read clearly at thumbnail size; text must remain legible; suitable for e-commerce platform display
Avoid: cluttered layout; unreadable small text; generic stock photo feel; overuse of gradients; watermark
